title: Enable nearest-neighbor rendering for game canvas

log.context: Enable nearest-neighbor rendering for game canvas

Both repos committed and pushed. Here's what was done:

**Files changed:**

1. `/mnt/data/clungiverse-client/src/renderer/canvas.ts`
   - Added `ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = false` immediately after `getContext('2d')` in `initCanvas()`
   - Added `if (ctx) ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = false` in `resize()` — canvas resize wipes all context state including this flag, so it must be re-applied every time the canvas is resized
